name: Reborn Coffee, Inc.
business: Reborn Coffee sells high-quality specialty-roasted coffee, tea, and other beverages along with bakery and dessert products through retail locations, kiosks, and online platforms. It also provides trucking, transportation, and logistics services through its subsidiary Reborn Logistics. The company serves retail consumers, wholesale distributors, hotels, and other enterprise customers.

exposures.sentence: We are a high growth operator and franchisor of retail locations and kiosks that focus on serving high quality, specialty-roasted coffee.
Reborn Logistics, Inc. (the Reborn Logistics ) a California corporation incorporated in September 2025. Reborn Logistics provides trucking, transportation and logistics services.
We have significantly expanded our online sales presence, including through Amazon, our own reborncoffee.com platform, and third-party retailers.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin franchise sales in 2026.

catalysts.event: Open up to ten franchise locations
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect to open up to ten franchise locations.
The efforts for the training school are underway and we expect to launch the program in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The retail market for coffee in the United States is expected to be $74.3 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to IBIS, in 2025, the retail market for coffee in the United States is expected to be $74.3 billion.
